name: Fake Fiverr Cashback Reward Phishing
description: Phishing email impersonating Fiverr with a fake loyalty reward to steal credentials

conversation.speaker: phishing_email
conversation.message: Your Fiverr account has earned a $200 loyalty cashback reward.

conversation.speaker: phishing_email
conversation.message: Log in through this exclusive link: http://fiverrr-rewards.net/cashback and connect your bank or PayPal to receive the transfer.
